metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the Arbiter .NET libraries — mediation, CQRS, mapping, Blazor dispatcher, communication, and more.

plugins.name: arbiter-skills
plugins.description: Skills that teach Claude how to install, register, and use the Arbiter family of .NET libraries (Mediation, CommandQuery + EF/Mongo, Mapping, Endpoints/Mvc, Dispatcher, Communication, Services, OpenTelemetry, Messaging.ServiceBus).
